title: The EU’s electricity grid investment gap – Can the next Connecting Europe Facility deliver? [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Financing energy infrastructure is emerging as a central issue in the next EU Multiannual Financial Framework, with the Connecting Europe Facility (CEF) 2028–2034 set to play a key role. As the EU accelerates the electrification and decarbonisation of its entire economy, the CEF’s effectiveness will depend on its ability to support not only cross-border interconnections, […]
